title: dracocephalum sibiricum
intro: Dracocephalum sibiricum, also known as Siberian Dragon's Head, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dracocephalum sibiricum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
